summary: Frontend changes add a consistent "Guest" fallback label and update feed/card rendering to use per-author profile lookups with safe principal parsing; diff summaries also claim post/comment UI no longer requires a profile. Backend changes are truncated in the provided diff, so removal of profile-enforcement traps for createPost/addComment/getFeed cannot be verified from the available evidence. Several unrelated frontend/UI/theme/auth improvements appear in the diff summary but were not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the backend profile-existence enforcement for creating posts and adding comments so an authenticated caller can create posts and comments even when they have not created a UserProfile.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo is truncated and the diff excerpt does not show any changes to createPost(...) or addComment(...) (e.g., removal of the trap "User must have a profile to create posts and comments!"). لذلك cannot confirm the enforcement was removed while keeping other auth checks intact.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update backend feed access so users without a profile can still retrieve and view the feed (getFeed should not trap solely due to missing profile).
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo is truncated and the diff excerpt does not show getFeed() logic or any removal of profile checks/traps for feed access.

hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement (REQ-19..REQ-23 focus on removing profile gating and displaying "Guest").

hallucinated_features.description: Footer content changes including new attribution and developer credit "Developed by Aryan Shinde".

hallucinated_features.description: Header authentication UX enhancements (toasts, improved button states, visual feedback).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; requirements do not mention auth UX changes.

hallucinated_features.description: Profile setup modal API changed to controlled modal with open/onOpenChange/onSuccess props.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; requirements explicitly say not to change profile creation UX beyond removing the posting/commenting gate.

hallucinated_features.description: Home page layout/UX changes adding multiple conditional "Create Profile" buttons/sections and conditional PostComposer display.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; requirements only ask to remove gating on post/comment creation and display "Guest" when profile missing.

hallucinated_features.description: Study groups page create flow hardened with extra checks and detailed error handling.
Forum page changes adding question posting dialog and placeholder for future forum posts.
Chat page implementation/changes (contact list, message composition, conversation view).
Moderation dashboard adjustments (enum comparison for filtering, report updates).
Media validation enhancements including shared 600MB video size constant/label and related UI validation.
